data.title: JOYSTAR Little Daisy Kids Bike for Girls Boys Ages 2-10 Years, 12 14 16 20 Inch Girls Bikes with Doll Bike Seat & Streamers,

features: Amazing Design and Color - JOYSTAR Little Daisy Princess 12 Inch girls bike is a beautiful and attractive bike with vibrant colors. The doll bike seat
and DIY decals make the journey even more enjoyable
For Safety Riding - The front hand caliper brakes and rear coaster
foot brake provide sufficient stopping power and increased safety. The kids bike also comes with the front and rear reflectors
wheel reflectors and the enclosed chainguard
Design for Kids - Removable training wheels are included. The bike includes adjustable saddle and stem height for a more comfortable fit and easy pedaling. Comes with a single speed drivetrain
making it simple for the child to maneuver the bicycle
Easy to Assemble - The children bike comes with 85% Pre-assembled body and the basic assembly tools
normally takes a novice about 20 minutes to assemble it. Our limited Lifetime Warranty covers the kids bicycles
Perfect Gift for Kids - 12 inch girls bike is suitable for 2-4 years old. A kids bike is a perfect gift for kids to foster physical activity
and provides endless fun and adventure

relatedProducts.Title: Glerc Maggie Girls Bike, 12-20 Inch Kids Bike for 2-13 Years Old Children, Princess Style Kids Bicycle with Doll-Seat & Basket & Training Wheels, Multiple Colors
relatedProducts.Features: 【Enchant Your Little Girl】 This princess-themed kids bike features an irresistibly cute design and a special doll-style seat. She won't want playtime to end! A dream surprise gift awaits. | 【Friendly Designs】 The saddle and handlebar of the girls bike are adjustable, it can easily cope with the growth of your child's height and grow with your kids. | 【Safe Riding】 Front hand brake and coaster brake provide enough braking force to control the distance easily. The kids bicycle also comes with a closed chain cover to further prevent children from getting hurt. | 【Size Guide】 This 14 inch bike is suitable for children ages 3-5, 38"-46" tall, with an inseam height of 17"-20". The bike weighs 24 lbs. Please focus on your child's height and inseam to choose the size. | 【Easy to Install】 Kids bike come with an 85% pre-assembled body and basic assembly tools, so you can add just a few parts to the bike and have it assembled in just 25 minutes.

relatedProducts.Title: Bixike Girls Bike with Basket for Toddlers and Kids Aged 3-14 Years Old, 12 14 16 18 Inch with Training Wheels & Doll Seat, 2
relatedProducts.Features: Size and Design: Bixike kids bike is designed specifically for children and comes in a size suitable for their age and height. The bike features sturdy frame, kid-friendly design with bright colors, and adjustable saddle and handlebars to ensure a comfortable fit.Pink Purple Orange color optional. | Safety Features: Safety is a top priority for Bixike girl bikes, and they come equipped with several features to protect children while they ride. These include training wheels for beginners, front caliper brakes and coaster brakes for easy stopping, and non-slip pedals to keep their feet in place. | Durability: The kids bikes are built to last, with high-quality components and materials that can withstand the wear and tear of regular use. They feature rust-resistant chains, and strong steel frames to ensure they can handle rough terrain and adventurous kids. | Age and Height Range: The 12" bike is designed for kids 2-4 years old or 32-41 inches tall.The 14" bike is designed for kids 3-5 years old or 37-45 inches tall. The 16" bike is designed for kids 4-8 years old or 41-51 inches tall.The 18" bike is designed for kids 9-12 years old or 49-57 inches tall.The 20" bike is designed for kids 12-14 years old or 51-61 inches tall. | Ease of Use: Bixike bikes are easy to assemble, with tools and instructions included. They are also lightweight, making them easy for kids to maneuver and ride without too much effort. Additionally, they are typically easy to clean and maintain, making them a great investment for parents looking for a reliable and convenient kids bike.
